input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.4.7.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.4.7.3
            TITLE: electric vehicles must pass electrical technical inspection and mechanical technical inspection

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.4.7.3: Electric Vehicles must pass Electrical Technical Inspection and Mechanical Technical Inspection
IN.4.7.3 Electric Vehicles must pass Electrical Technical Inspection and Mechanical Technical Inspection 
before the vehicle may attempt any further Inspections.  See EV.11.3.2

final_answer: Electric Vehicles must pass Electrical Technical Inspection and Mechanical Technical Inspection before the vehicle may attempt any further Inspections. See EV.11.3.2
